prompt: Create a vertical cyberpunk punk-girl portrait in a dark neon graffiti alley, photographed like a high-contrast fashion editorial with blacklight lighting. A young woman kneels low in the center foreground, her face deliberately obscured by a solid muted purple rectangular block, with long dark hair and vivid purple highlights in a high ponytail. She wears a black paint-splattered oversized jacket, black crop top with a glowing cat face graphic, dark denim shorts, layered chokers and necklaces, thigh straps, black platform combat boots, black nail polish, and splashes of hot pink, cyan, and violet paint across her clothes and legs. She holds exactly two spray paint cans: one in her left hand extended toward the viewer and one upright in her right hand. Beside her on the lower right sits exactly one black cat with green eyes, a collar charm, neon paint splatters on its fur, and a glowing pink crown graffiti mark above its head. The background is a dense black wall covered in dripping neon graffiti, arcade-game doodles, hearts, cats, and text in magenta, cyan, and violet. Include exactly 8 prominent readable graffiti text elements: “KAWAIIII” at upper left in hot pink dripping letters, “NO O” below it, “NEE-CHAN” large at left-center, “DAIISUKKI” at upper right in hot pink, “KAWASHO-CHAN” at right-center in cyan, “GAME OVER” on the left, “LEVEL UP!” on the lower right, and “LOVE UP!” in a small sign near the cat. Include exactly 6 main icon groups: a purple cat face doodle on the left wall, a neon cat head near the top center, a skull with heart eyes near the upper right, an HP bar with 7 heart icons, repeated xoxo marks in cyan, and several dripping heart outlines. Use wet paint drips, splatters, glow bloom, saturated magenta/cyan rim light, gritty texture, shallow depth of field, and an intense rebellious kawaii-goth mood. No extra people, no watermark, no additional readable text beyond the specified graffiti.
